---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes, tutorials, and practical ideas in plant disease epidemiology."
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  contents: "posts"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
margin-header: subscribe.html
title-block-banner: "#E3EDF3"
title-block-banner-color: body
search: false
---

This space brings together short notes, tutorials, and applied modeling content connected to plant pathology, quantitative epidemiology, and data science.
